context: Saving a strong user preference about code output style that should persist across all sessions

checklist.name: Uses --tier semantic
checklist.description: Uses `--tier semantic` since this is a persistent preference/rule, not a time-bound event

checklist.name: Captures the no-comments preference
checklist.description: Captured text clearly states no comments are to be added unless explicitly requested

checklist.name: Uses --text flag
checklist.description: Content is passed via `--text` flag or pipe

checklist.name: Uses relevant tags
checklist.description: Attaches tags like `--tags preference,comments,code-style` or similar

checklist.name: No project scoping (global preference)
checklist.description: Does NOT use `--project` flag since this is a global preference, not project-specific

checklist.name: Command is valid shell syntax
checklist.description: The command is syntactically correct and would execute without errors
